message:
🌱 Add metallb: Failover time very high in layer2 mode mission (#820)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "metallb-298-failover-time-very-high-in-layer2-mode",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "metallb: Failover time very high in layer2 mode",
+    "description": "Failover time very high in layer2 mode. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify metallb troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your metallb deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n metallb-system -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb -n metallb-system --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review metallb configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the MetalLB configuration and check for failover behavior:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n metallb-system -o wide\nkubectl get ipaddresspools.metallb.io -n metallb-system\nkubectl logs -l component=speaker -n metallb-system --tail=50\n```\nIn Layer 2 mode, failover time depends on the Kubernetes node monitor grace period (default: 40s). When a node hosting the leader speaker goes down, MetalLB must wait for Kubernetes to mark the node as unhealthy before electing a new leader."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Failover time very high in layer2 mode",
+        "description": "The failover time in Layer 2 mode is primarily governed by the Kubernetes `--node-monitor-grace-period` setting (default: 40s). To reduce failover time:\n\n1. Adjust the kube-controller-manager setting:\n```\n--node-monitor-grace-period duration     Default: 40s\n```\nThis controls how long Kubernetes waits before marking an unresponsive node as unhealthy.\n\n2. The total failover time includes:\n   - Node monitor grace period (~40s default)\n   - MetalLB leader re-election time\n   - ARP/NDP announcement propagation\n\nTo test failover behavior, you can simulate a node failure and measure recovery time."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Failover time very high in layer2 mode is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=metallb -n metallb-system --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n metallb-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Yes, it should per default take around 40 secs to detect unhealthy nodes. The relevant setting is https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/command-line-tools-reference/kube-controller-manager/#options \n\n```\n--node-monitor-grace-period duration\u00a0\u00a0\u00a0\u00a0\u00a0Default: 40s\n--\n\u00a0 | Amount of time which we allow running Node to be unresponsive before marking it unhealthy.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "--node-monitor-grace-period duration\u00a0\u00a0\u00a0\u00a0\u00a0Default: 40s\n--\n\u00a0 | Amount of time which we allow running Node to be unresponsive before marking it unhealthy. Must be N times more than kubelet's nodeStatusUpdateFrequency, where N means number of retries allowed for kubelet to post node status.",
+        "#!/usr/bin/python -u\nimport requests\nimport time\n\ndef test():\n    try:\n        response = requests.get(\"http://10.115.195.206\", timeout=0.5)\n    except:\n        return False\n    return True\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    while 1:\n        result = test()\n        print time.time(), result\n        time.sleep(1)",
+        "1534092121.95 True\n...\n1534092293.57 True\n1534092294.68 True\n1534092295.8 True\n1534092296.92 True\n1534092297.97 False\n1534092299.48 False\n...\n1534092603.64 False\n1534092605.14 False\n1534092606.65 False\n1534092607.76 True\n1534092608.87 True\n1534092610.08 True"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "metallb",
+      "sandbox",

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+    },

+    ],
